Home / Real Estate
The Inspire Group — Real Estate

Nobody retires from real estate. We built the exit.

Most agents have accumulated a career — closing what comes, one deal at a time. This is what it looks like to design one instead: high splits, real equity in the brokerage itself, and overrides on the roster you build, so what you build here doesn't disappear the day you stop producing. Proven, tested, and award-winning, whether you're just getting started or already building and leading your own roster.

What's Included

Built for what you keep.

Brokerage. High splits. Low caps. No monthly fees. Once you cap, you keep what you earn — full stop. An internationally-backed, award-winning brokerage, built for however you want to work — solo, on a team, or building your own roster. Built on tools that reach every part of the business — lead generation, relationship nurturing, coordination from contract to close, and follow-up — engineered to turn clients into raving fans, not just closings.

"High splits. Real equity. A roster that pays you back — not just a single 'grind and burn-out' plan."

Beyond commission. Real equity in the public brokerage entity behind TIG, and overrides on the roster you build. There's a small, proven title ownership opportunity here too, for the few who go deep enough to want it — it's not why you'll come, but it's here if you do.

THE EXIT Built In
How It Works

From first conversation to a real exit.

Whether you're new to real estate or already building and leading your own roster, the starting point is the same — and so is the path forward.

01

Start Where You Are

New to real estate or already building and leading your own roster — the conversation starts with where you are and where you want to go.

02

Plug Into the Platform

Brokerage support and cross-division resources come together from day one — not as separate relationships to manage.

03

Buyers Who Show Up Ready

Loop us in early, and your buyers move through the Buy Smart. Own Better. system before they ever start touring homes — financially and competitively prepared, not just pre-approved. Fewer deals that stall in underwriting. Smoother closings. Buyers who refer you because the experience felt different.

04

Build a Roster of Your Own

Ten agents on your roster, and you didn't close a single one of their deals — but their production doesn't stop paying you the day you close your last one.

Why It Works

Built for a way off the production wheel.

Most brokerages nickel-and-dime you before you ever close a deal. Here, the split's high, the cap is low, and the fees mostly disappear once you've crossed it.

💰

Built to Keep What You Earn

High splits and low caps mean you stop paying for the privilege of working here almost as soon as you start. No monthly fees eating into a slow month.

📈

Real Equity, Not Just a Paycheck

Beyond commission, there's real equity in the public brokerage entity behind TIG — and overrides on the roster you build. Title carries its own small ownership opportunity too, for the few who go deep enough to want it.

☀️
The industry rewards the grind. We reward what you build.
— The Inspire Group
Where It Leads

Real estate doesn't stand alone here.

Every relationship built here has a natural next step — in real diversification, or in the equity and residual income that build a Wealth Equivalence of your own.

☀️
If money were no object, what would you be doing with your time?
Real estate can be the vehicle that answers that — or it can just be another job with better hours. The difference is what you build behind the commission.
🏦

Financial

Mortgage, insurance, investment, and tax recovery — including the Buy Smart. Own Better. system — matched to whatever you're building next.

Income. Equity. Residuals. The path for anyone ready to build alongside TIG, not just with it.
